intro_topics: Ho Chi Minh's thought on education
Education as cultivation of knowledge, ethics, ideals, responsibility, and service
Revolutionary education example through the 'Những hạt giống đỏ' prompt
question_topic_groups: Ho Chi Minh quotes on learning and national future
Comprehensive education: morality, intellect, physical education, aesthetics
Learning with practice and theory with reality
Lifelong learning and education for all
Role of talent and knowledge in national strength
Medical ethics and responsibility toward patients

stories.lesson_summary: Serve patients with conscience, responsibility, compassion, and professional solidarity.

stories.title: Phải chăm chỉ học tập
stories.lesson_summary: Study continuously to improve ability and serve the people better.

stories.title: Thời gian quý báu lắm
stories.lesson_summary: Respect time, keep promises, and avoid making the collective wait.

stories.title: Đôi bàn tay
stories.lesson_summary: Courage, determination, and labor can open a path through hardship.

stories.title: Bác Hồ với tinh thần tự học
stories.lesson_summary: Self-learning is a disciplined, creative, lifelong method for personal growth.

modules.title: Gương sáng Chi bộ 2
content_summary: Photos of collectives and individuals receiving commendations for studying and following Ho Chi Minh's thought, morality, and style.
Event imagery from 2024, 2025, and 2026 recognition/commemoration programs.
Group photos of students, lecturers, and representatives with certificates and awards.
detected_events: Recognition of collectives and individuals in 2024
Four-year review of Conclusion 01-KL/TW and 2025 commendation program
Commemoration of the 136th birth anniversary of President Ho Chi Minh and 2026 Party badge ceremony
